info.title: GitReleaseNoteGenerator
info.description: A .NET global tool that generates categorized release notes from git commit history using the GitHub API.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Generate categorized release notes from git commit history

options.name: --token
options.description: GitHub personal access token (defaults to GITHUB_TOKEN env var)

options.name: --owner
options.description: Repository owner (defaults to GITHUB_REPOSITORY env var)

options.name: --repo
options.description: Repository name (defaults to GITHUB_REPOSITORY env var)

options.name: --base-ref
options.description: Base ref to compare from (defaults to latest release tag)

options.name: --head-ref
options.description: Head ref to compare to (defaults to default branch)

options.name: --release-version
options.description: Version string for release notes (defaults to NBGV auto-detection)

options.name: --output-file
options.description: Write release notes to a file

options.name: --github-output
options.description: Write release notes to GITHUB_OUTPUT [default: False]

options.name: --output-name
options.description: Variable name when writing to GITHUB_OUTPUT [default: changelog]
